compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 1000W HPS ballast, any 630W CMH ballast, any 600W MH ballast (120V or 240V)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off control only via 120V trigger cord from external timer or environmental controller. No dimming. 4 outlets, 1000W per outlet, 30A total relay. X-style outlets allow 120V or 240V ballast operation without cord changes. All major HID brands (Lumatek, Phantom, Gavita, Nanolux, Sun System, etc.) supported as long as outlet plug matches NEMA 6-15/X-Plug.
